reason: WIN-053.c5 H7: flux direction not discussed — dome's fitted formula has both poles positive-signed (both sources) while a real toroidal ring-magnet has one source and one sink. This requires physics analysis of the dome's two-pole formula B(r) = 62376*exp(-r_N/8619) + 64852*exp(-r_S/8619) to show both terms are additive rather than one source/one sink. Requires scientific judgment.
